interpretation: Aggregate stable/cash share of observed KSh/KES cohort pool deposit, swap-in, and swap-out value under metadata-weighted voucher valuation.
calibration_use: Calibrates how much stable/cash flow can appear in Kenyan KSh voucher pools without treating the network as cash-dominated.
claim_boundary: This is a gross flow share for the paper cohort, not an end-of-period pool inventory snapshot; KSh voucher units are weighted by voucher_value metadata.

interpretation: Aggregate KSh/KES voucher share of observed paper-cohort pool deposit, swap-in, and swap-out value under metadata-weighted voucher valuation.
calibration_use: Calibrates the KSh voucher-denominated settlement base that bond scenarios should preserve.
claim_boundary: KSh/KES voucher values are USD-normalized for bond-accounting comparability; USD/non-KSh vouchers are excluded.

interpretation: Aggregate stable/cash share of observed KSh/KES cohort gross flow under the simulator convention that one voucher token unit is one KSh.
calibration_use: Provides the strict 1 KSh empirical comparator for simulator flow diagnostics.
claim_boundary: This is a gross flow share, not a pool inventory snapshot; it intentionally ignores voucher_value metadata for KSh vouchers.

interpretation: Aggregate KSh/KES voucher share of observed paper-cohort gross flow under strict 1 voucher token = 1 KSh valuation.
calibration_use: Provides the strict 1 KSh empirical voucher-flow baseline used for simulator comparability.
claim_boundary: This is a flow statistic; USD/non-KSh vouchers are excluded from the paper cohort.

interpretation: Median paper-cohort pool-level stable/cash share of observed gross flow.
calibration_use: Provides a pool-level baseline for cash-dependency sensitivity.
claim_boundary: This is a descriptive flow statistic and not a welfare or convertibility claim.

interpretation: 90th percentile paper-cohort pool-level stable/cash share of observed gross flow.
calibration_use: Bounds high-stable-flow pool behavior in stress tests.
claim_boundary: High stable flow may be healthy liquidity or dependence; interpretation requires local context.

interpretation: Median stable share of positive net observed paper-cohort pool-flow balance.
calibration_use: Approximates active-pool stable dependence for Kenyan KSh voucher pools when no direct balance snapshot is available.
claim_boundary: This is a proxy from deposits and swaps; it is not a raw on-chain pool balance snapshot.

interpretation: Aggregate stable share of positive net observed paper-cohort pool-flow balance under metadata-weighted voucher valuation.
calibration_use: Legacy empirical anchor for stable/voucher composition diagnostics; strict 1 KSh comparator is reported separately.
claim_boundary: This floors negative net flows at zero and should be treated as a flow proxy, not a direct balance.

interpretation: Aggregate stable share of positive net observed paper-cohort pool-flow balance using voucher_value metadata for KSh vouchers.
calibration_use: Makes the legacy metadata-weighted valuation explicit for comparison with strict simulator units.
claim_boundary: This floors negative net flows at zero and should be treated as a flow proxy, not a direct balance.

interpretation: Aggregate stable share of positive net observed paper-cohort pool-flow balance under strict 1 voucher token = 1 KSh valuation.
calibration_use: Primary empirical comparator for simulator diagnostics because producer vouchers are modeled as one KSh units.
claim_boundary: This floors negative net flows at zero and should be treated as a flow proxy, not a direct balance.

interpretation: Cash/stable share of standalone historical backing injections.
calibration_use: Keeps validation backing from becoming unrealistically cash-heavy.
claim_boundary: Standalone backing includes voucher backing as well as cash/stable support.

interpretation: Pool-era share of successful swaps that convert voucher value to stable/cash.
calibration_use: Calibrates stable-borrowing pressure in no-bond and bond scenarios.
claim_boundary: This is an observed swap motif, not a legal loan-performance denominator.

interpretation: Recent share of successful swaps that remain voucher-to-voucher.
calibration_use: Sets the current ROLA-like circulation baseline that bond cells should not crowd out.
claim_boundary: This is not a direct failed-route denominator.

interpretation: Stable output relative to voucher input in voucher-to-stable borrowing/advance motifs.
calibration_use: Calibrates how much cash-equivalent liquidity is drawn against voucher obligations.
claim_boundary: Voucher obligations are converted from KES/KSh to USD-equivalent; use as a dependency diagnostic.

interpretation: Stable input relative to voucher output in stable-to-voucher debt-removal motifs.
calibration_use: Calibrates stable-credit closure and repayment sensitivity.
claim_boundary: This is a transaction motif proxy, not proof of household welfare improvement.
